governance.name: Governance
governance.description: Board and senior management oversight of technology risk, cybersecurity awareness and training, and technology audit requirements for capital market entities.

technology-risk-management.name: Technology Risk Management
technology-risk-management.description: Establishment and implementation of a robust TRM Framework including policies, procedures, compliance processes, risk identification, assessment, mitigation, monitoring and reporting.

technology-operation-management.name: Technology Operation Management
technology-operation-management.description: Operational controls covering project management, system acquisition and development, testing, access control, cryptography, data security, storage, disposal, change management, patching, network resilience, operational resilience and IT disaster recovery.

technology-service-provider-management.name: Technology Service Provider Management
technology-service-provider-management.description: Due diligence, performance monitoring, cloud services governance, and contract management requirements for third-party technology service providers engaged by capital market entities.

cyber-security-management.name: Cyber Security Management
cyber-security-management.description: Cyber security framework, preventive measures and monitoring, incident response and recovery, cyber security assessment including penetration testing, and cyber simulation exercises.

notification-process.name: Notification Process
notification-process.description: Mandatory notification to the SC for technology-related implementations, technology incidents, cyber incidents and near miss events.
